Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add complete "Sell Your Car" feature with dealer vehicle listings

This commit implements the full "Sell Your Car" functionality allowing users to submit vehicle listings and dealers to view and express interest in them.

Key Features:
- User vehicle listing submission with image upload and base64 storage
- Admin moderation interface for approving/rejecting listings
- Dealer vehicle listings view with region-based filtering
- Express interest functionality for dealers
- Auto-moderation toggle for instant approval
- Email notifications for sellers on approval
- Detailed vehicle view modal with image gallery
- Email and call buttons for dealer-seller communication
- Notification system for new listings in dealer''s region

API Endpoints:
- POST/GET /api/sell-vehicle - Submit and fetch user listings
- GET /api/dealer/vehicle-listings - View available listings for dealers
- POST /api/dealer/interest - Express interest in a listing
- GET/PATCH/DELETE /api/admin/sell-listings - Admin moderation

Database:
- Added UserVehicleListing model with region-based filtering
- Added DealerInterest model for tracking dealer interest
- Updated notification system for listing alerts

UI Improvements:
- Enhanced dealer dashboard with Vehicle Listings tab
- Added image display on listing cards with fallback icons
- Implemented detailed modal view with all vehicle information
- Added email seller and call seller buttons
- Region-based filtering (shows dealer''s region + null region listings)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
